category_sources: Official libsmi library page says libsmi gives network management applications access to MIB and PIB module information.
source_facts.description: Library to Access SMI MIB Information.
display_name_sources: Official IBR/TU Braunschweig project pages use the name libsmi.
docs_sources: Official libsmi homepage is the primary documentation surface.
Official libsmi library and tools pages document the API purpose and bundled tools.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official libsmi download page says the code moved to the public GitLab repository https://gitlab.ibr.cs.tu-bs.de/nm/libsmi.
tags_sources: Official libsmi library page describes MIB and PIB access for network management applications.
